_comment: Civic flows the e2e sweep drives, kept as DATA so adding a workflow is a manifest edit, not a change to ui_sweep.py. Each entry: `switchLabel` = the progressive-disclosure button to reach it. A corpus flow adds `postcode` + `cta` + `markers` and is run + asserted; an entry without a `cta` is a switch-and-screenshot peek (e.g. the On It route). Each corpus flow's markers include its own summary line, so flows sharing one surface can't false-pass off a stale render.

flows.name: care
markers: Always confirm with the official source

flows.name: wander
markers: Free places to wander near you
Always confirm with the official source
